title: Add VAT Registration and PAYE Registration services under Services menu

requirements.summary: Add a 'VAT Registration' entry to the services catalog under a tax/compliance category with comprehensive details covering mandatory vs voluntary registration, VAT scheme options, HMRC submission, VAT number provision, and ongoing support guidance
acceptanceCriteria: A VAT Registration service entry exists in the services catalog with title, description, features list, and price.
The service is categorised under compliance or a dedicated tax category.

file_operations.description: Add a new 'VAT Registration' service entry to the services catalog array with category 'compliance', title, description (covering mandatory vs voluntary registration, VAT scheme options including Standard, Flat Rate, and Cash Accounting), price (e.g., £150), and a features array listing: 'Mandatory vs voluntary registration assessment', 'VAT scheme options (Standard, Flat Rate, Cash Accounting)', 'Submission to HMRC on your behalf', 'VAT registration number provision', 'Ongoing VAT compliance guidance'. Model the entry structure on existing services in the catalog, ensuring all required Service interface fields are populated.

requirements.summary: Add a 'PAYE Registration' entry to the services catalog under the same compliance/tax category with details covering employer PAYE scheme registration, employer reference number provision, NI and income tax setup guidance, and payroll compliance
acceptanceCriteria: A PAYE Registration service entry exists in the services catalog with title, description, features list, and price.
The service is categorised in the same category as VAT Registration.

file_operations.description: Add a new 'PAYE Registration' service entry to the services catalog array with category 'compliance', title, description (covering employer PAYE scheme registration with HMRC, employer reference number provision, NI and income tax setup), price (e.g., £180), and a features array listing: 'Employer PAYE scheme registration with HMRC', 'Employer reference number provision', 'National Insurance setup guidance', 'Income tax setup and configuration', 'Payroll compliance advisory'. Use the same Service interface structure as existing catalog entries.

requirements.summary: Create a dedicated service detail page for VAT Registration presenting benefits, included features, pricing, and a call-to-action, following the layout pattern of RegisteredOfficeServicePage.tsx and BusinessSupportServicePage.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: A `/services/vat-registration` route exists and renders the VAT Registration page.
The page displays benefits, included features, pricing, and a CTA.
The layout is consistent with other service detail pages.

file_operations.description: Create a new service detail page component for VAT Registration. Follow the layout pattern from RegisteredOfficeServicePage.tsx and BusinessSupportServicePage.tsx: include a hero section with title and description, a benefits section with at least 3 benefit cards (e.g., 'Expert VAT Advice', 'HMRC Liaison', 'Scheme Selection Support'), a detailed service description section explaining what's included (mandatory vs voluntary registration, scheme options, submission process, VAT number provision, ongoing support), a pricing section displaying the price from the catalog, and a clear call-to-action button. Use the Section component for consistent vertical spacing. Fetch the 'VAT Registration' service from the servicesCatalog by matching the title, and display its features and price. Ensure the page is fully responsive and matches the visual style of existing service pages.

requirements.summary: Create a dedicated service detail page for PAYE Registration presenting benefits, included features, pricing, and a call-to-action, following the same layout pattern as other service pages
acceptanceCriteria: A `/services/paye-registration` route exists and renders the PAYE Registration page.
The page displays benefits, included features, pricing, and a CTA.
The layout is consistent with other service detail pages.

file_operations.description: Create a new service detail page component for PAYE Registration. Follow the same layout pattern as VATRegistrationServicePage.tsx and other service pages: include a hero section with title and description, a benefits section with at least 3 benefit cards (e.g., 'Employer Registration', 'PAYE Compliance', 'Payroll Setup Support'), a detailed service description section explaining what's included (employer PAYE scheme registration, employer reference number, NI and income tax setup, payroll compliance), a pricing section displaying the price from the catalog, and a clear call-to-action button. Use the Section component for consistent vertical spacing. Fetch the 'PAYE Registration' service from the servicesCatalog by matching the title, and display its features and price. Ensure the page is fully responsive and matches the visual style of existing service pages.

requirements.summary: Register the two new routes `/services/vat-registration` and `/services/paye-registration` in App.tsx, pointing to VATRegistrationServicePage and PAYERegistrationServicePage respectively
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to `/services/vat-registration` loads the VAT Registration page without a 404.
Navigating to `/services/paye-registration` loads the PAYE Registration page without a 404.

file_operations.description: Add two new Route entries in the router configuration: one for path '/services/vat-registration' importing and rendering VATRegistrationServicePage, and another for path '/services/paye-registration' importing and rendering PAYERegistrationServicePage. Place these routes alongside the existing service routes (e.g., after '/services/registered-office' and '/services/business-support'). Ensure the imports are added at the top of the file following the existing import pattern.

requirements.summary: Update the Services dropdown/navigation in SiteLayout.tsx to include links for 'VAT Registration' and 'PAYE Registration' alongside existing service links
acceptanceCriteria: The Services menu/dropdown in the header contains a 'VAT Registration' link.
The Services menu/dropdown in the header contains a 'PAYE Registration' link.
Both links navigate to their respective pages.

file_operations.description: Add two new Link elements to the Services dropdown menu in both the desktop navigation and mobile navigation sections: one for 'VAT Registration' linking to '/services/vat-registration' and another for 'PAYE Registration' linking to '/services/paye-registration'. Place these new links after the existing 'Business Support' link in the dropdown. Ensure consistent styling with the existing service links (using the same className patterns for hover states and text styles). Update both the desktop DropdownMenuContent section and the mobile sheet navigation section to maintain feature parity.

requirements.summary: Update the services overview page to include cards for 'VAT Registration' and 'PAYE Registration', consistent in style with the existing service category cards, each linking to their respective detail pages
acceptanceCriteria: The Services overview page displays a card for VAT Registration linking to `/services/vat-registration`.
The Services overview page displays a card for PAYE Registration linking to `/services/paye-registration`.
Cards match the visual style of existing service cards.

file_operations.description: Add two new service cards to the services grid for 'VAT Registration' and 'PAYE Registration'. Each card should follow the same structure as the existing four category cards: include an appropriate icon (e.g., FileText or Calculator from lucide-react), the service title as a heading, a brief description (2-3 sentences summarizing the service), and a 'Learn More' link pointing to the respective service page ('/services/vat-registration' and '/services/paye-registration'). Maintain the same card styling with white background, rounded corners, shadow on hover, and padding. Add these cards to the existing grid layout, which may need to adjust to accommodate 6 cards instead of 4 (consider updating the grid-cols classes to grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 for a 2x3 layout).
